title: hieracium erioleucum subsp. eriovillosum
intro: Hieracium erioleucum subsp. eriovillosum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Hieracium erioleucum subsp. eriovillosum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
